chunks.text: Achieving AI Alignment with Unreliable Supervision (EECS-2024-148) by Shivam Singhal, Cassidy Laidlaw and Anca Dragan. CoS: Enhancing Personalization and Mitigating Bias with Context Steering (EECS-2024-99) by Sashrika Pandey, Zhiyang He, Mariah Schrum and Anca Dragan.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the 2024 technical reports?
chunks.answer: AI Alignment and CoS with various authors.

chunks.text: Similarity-Based Representation Learning (EECS-2023-78) by Yi Liu, Andreea Bobu and Anca Dragan. Learning Representations that Enable Generalization in Assistive Tasks (EECS-2022-233) by Zhiyang He and Anca Dragan.
chunks.question: Which reports focus on representation learning and generalization?

chunks.text: Teaching Robots to Span the Space of Functional Expressive Motion (EECS-2022-45) by Arjun Sripathy, Andreea Bobu, Zhongyu Li, Koushil Sreenath, Daniel Brown and Anca Dragan. Inducing Structure in Reward Learning by Learning Features (EECS-2021-219) by Andreea Bobu, Marius Wiggert, Claire Tomlin and Anca Dragan.
chunks.question: What are the topics of the 2022 and 2021 robot and reward learning reports?
chunks.answer: Functional expressive motion and reward learning.

chunks.text: Enabling Generalization of Human Models for Human-AI Collaboration to New Tasks (EECS-2021-199) by Xiaocheng Yang and Anca Dragan. Learning with Humans in the Loop (EECS-2020-76) by Gokul Swamy.
chunks.question: Which reports involve human-AI collaboration and human-in-the-loop learning?
chunks.answer: Generalization of Human Models and Learning with Humans.
